name: NCrunch
description: Commercial automated continuous-testing extension for Visual Studio and JetBrains Rider that runs .NET tests in the background as you type and displays inline coverage.

seo.title: NCrunch — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: NCrunch: Commercial automated continuous-testing extension for Visual Studio and JetBrains Rider that runs .NET tests in the background as you type and displays

when_to_use: Continuous background test execution while writing code
Inline coverage indicators directly in Visual Studio
Instant feedback on test impact of every code change
Risk coverage metrics showing untested code density

pros: Continuous test runs as you type, real flow benefit
Inline coverage markers inside the IDE
Works in Visual Studio and Rider
cons: High RAM and CPU usage on big solutions
review.verdict: A real productivity boost for disciplined TDD on .NET, if your team will actually use it daily.
review.best_for: Senior .NET developers doing real TDD who benefit from instant feedback
review.not_for: Teams that rarely run tests locally or work on low-spec machines
